proof_boundary: This artifact certifies K_1(t)<=7/(2t^2) only from t=319 through the mode u=2 handoff. It does not certify u>=2, complete order-four entry, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.
remaining_target: Prove K_1(t)<=7/(2t^2) on the analytic mode ray u>=2.
status: rigorous compact interval certificate; analytic ray remains open
